title: zanthoxylum brisasanum
intro: Zanthoxylum brisasanum, also known as the Fragrant Prickly Ash, is a flowering plant native to Central and South America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion, as well as exhibiting potential anticancer and anti-inflammatory effects. The Fragrant Prickly Ash can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, offering versatile herbal preparations for various health needs.
